era: Hip-Hop. E=5 -- Rainier Valley community voice, Sub Pop hip-hop expansion, deliberate weighted delivery. Thirtieth degree in hip-hop era (134-163). v1.49.303.

location.formative: Rainier Valley -- Columbia City, Hillman City, Rainier Beach. Most diverse neighborhoods in Seattle. South-end community voice.
location.career: Porter Ray. Rainier Valley MC on Sub Pop Records. 2014-present. Community testimony.

members.name: Porter Ray
members.note: Rainier Valley. Deliberate, weighted delivery. Street narrative. Community testimony.

associated_musicians.note: Shabazz Palaces frontman. Sub Pop hip-hop connection.

theory_nodes.concept: Community testimony -- lyrics as community documentation. Named streets, specific events, real people. The Rainier Valley story told by someone who lived it. Art as testimony.
examples: Rainier Valley geography: specific streets, locations.
Violence, loss, survival, hope -- lived experience.
Not observation from outside. Testimony from within.
Art functioning as both expression and documentation.
theory_nodes.description: Community testimony. Rainier Valley voice. Art as documentation.

genealogy.relationship: Porter Ray at 163. Rainier Valley testimony.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop hip-hop expansion -- Shabazz Palaces (157, experimental) + Porter Ray (163, narrative). Sub Pop's hip-hop roster spans geographic and stylistic breadth. The iconic Seattle label embraces hip-hop.
examples: Different geographies: Capitol Hill orbit vs. Rainier Valley.
Sub Pop credibility amplifies community voice.
theory_nodes.description: Sub Pop hip-hop expansion. Second hip-hop signing.

ancestors: Sub Pop (1988). Grunge, indie, then hip-hop.
genealogy.relationship: Porter Ray at 163. Sub Pop hip-hop breadth.

theory_nodes.concept: South-end geography -- Rainier Valley voice distinct from Capitol Hill's arts corridor. Residential, diverse, community-oriented. The south end of Seattle produces different music.
examples: Rainier Valley: Columbia City, Hillman City, Rainier Beach.
Capitol Hill: arts-oriented. Rainier Valley: community-oriented.
theory_nodes.description: South-end geography. Rainier Valley. Different music.

genealogy.relationship: Porter Ray at 163. South-end voice enters.

cross_references.relationship: GEOGRAPHIC CONTRAST! Grieves: Capitol Hill, emotional introspection. Porter Ray: Rainier Valley, community testimony. Two neighborhoods, two approaches.
SUB POP PAIR! Both on Sub Pop. Shabazz: experimental. Porter Ray: narrative. The label's hip-hop breadth.
COMMUNITY HIP-HOP! Blue Scholars: Filipino-American community. Porter Ray: Rainier Valley community. Community-rooted across neighborhoods.
